title: Vera Bradley Q4 2022 Earnings Results
text: Vera Bradley reported Q4 2022 earnings results with net income of $5.7 million or $0.15 per share, missing estimated earnings by 34.62% against an estimate of $0.26. The company's adjusted earnings were $0.17 per share. For fiscal year 2022, net revenues grew 15.4% to $540.5 million and net income totaled $17.8 million or $0.52 per diluted share. The Vera Bradley brand had solid year of revenue growth with year-over-year total sales increasing over 18%. Pura Vida brand total sales grew just over 6% for the year. The company faced supply chain challenges and GSP tariff issues that negatively affected earnings. For fiscal 2023, the company expected consolidated net revenues of $555 to $575 million, with Vera Bradley revenues expected to grow in the low-to mid-single digit range and Pura Vida revenues expected to be flat to up by low-single digits.
